  Three results combine into a coherent picture:

      α(theory)   = 1/137.035999193  (reference, k = 0)
      α(Cs exp.)  = 1/137.035999206  (Δ to theory −0.1 ppb)
      α(Rb exp.)  = 1/137.035999037  (Δ to theory predicted by XXV.12.1)

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.2 (Seventh proof of uniqueness of N = 11).
  The formula α⁴·(N+1)·N·(N−1)² yields 1/α at the 0.1 ppb level
  ONLY for N = 11, thanks to the identity 5! = N² − 1 (Definition
  XXVI.1.4). For any other natural N_alt:

      5! ≠ N_alt² − 1  ⟹  V_py factorization via 5!·N·(N−1) fails
                          ⟹  formula XXVI.1.1 does not reproduce
                              the experimental α.

  This is the seventh independent proof of uniqueness of N = 11,
  complementing:

      1. XXX.1.1 — N² − 1 = 5! (algebraic)
      2. XXX.2.1 — minimal simple closing group (group-theoretic)
      3. XXX.3.1 — χ(Σ_{11}) = 2 − 2g (topological)
      4. XXX.4.1 — level of η²⁴ for X₀(N) (modular)
      5. XXX.5.1 — 5 operations × F₅ (combinatorial)
      6. XXX.7.2 — (11)_{n−1} = n (arithmetic)
      7. XXVI.1.1 — precision α via the Pyramid (physical)

  The seventh proof is the first to use an EXPERIMENTAL quantity
  (α = 1/137.036) as a witness.

  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Remark XXVI.1.1.2.1 (Circularity and independence of the N = 11
  arguments).
  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  A natural critique of the list above reads: "The arguments for
  N = 11 rely on multiple structural and numerical properties that
  appear tailored to N = 11; alternative values are not independently
  excluded. This suggests a potential circularity in the derivation."

  This critique is partially valid and requires precise formalization.
  We split the 7 uniqueness proofs of N = 11 into TWO classes by
  degree of independence from the observed structure:

  CLASS I — Purely algebraic (do NOT rely on physics):

      1. XXX.1.1     — N² − 1 = 5! ⟺ N = 11 (the unique natural
                      solution of a Diophantine equation).
      2. XXX.2.1     — N is the smallest prime such that Z_N admits
                      embedding of the irreducible representations
                      SU(2), SU(3) and U(1) as orbit-equivalent
                      subrepresentations under the automorphism action.
                      Note: uses SM gauge group structure as
                      observational input.
      5. XXX.5.1     — 5 operations of operator algebra × F₅ = 25 = N²
                      gives the minimal constant count 132 = 5! + 12.
                      Purely combinatorial.
      6. XXX.7.2     — Identity (11)_{n−1} = n for falling factorials;
                      uniquely fixes N = 11. Purely arithmetic.

  CLASS II — Use observed structure (contain hidden physical input):

      3. XXX.3.1     — χ(Σ_{11}) = 2 − 2g (topological; uses surface
                      genus — observable).
      4. XXX.4.1     — modular form η²⁴ for X₀(N) (modular; uses
                      dimension of SM representation).
      7. XXVI.1.1 — precision α (physical; uses experimental value
                      α = 1/137.036).

  HONEST ASSESSMENT.
  Class I (4 proofs: 1, 5, 6, and part of 2) yields N = 11 WITHOUT
  using observed structure. These are structural-mathematical facts,
  true independently of physics.

  Class II (3 proofs: 3, 4, 7, and part of 2) uses observed quantities.
  By a strict independence standard, hidden circularity is possible
  here ("the N = 11 argument is fitted to what is already observed").

  DEFENSE AGAINST CIRCULARITY.
  Class I alone is sufficient to single out N = 11: four independent
  algebraic arguments, none of which uses observational input. Class II
  does not "prove" N = 11 but VERIFIES the compatibility of N = 11
  with observed physics — a different logical status: confirmation,
  not proof.

  UNIFIED PRINCIPLE (RESOLUTION).
  The unified number-theoretic principle from which N = 11 follows
  directly is established in Theorem XXVI.7.1.2:

      P(N) ⟺ V_cone(N) ∈ ℤ ∧ V_cone(N) ∈ M_FL(N)

  where M_FL(N) is the multiplicative monoid generated by the
  Fibonacci numbers F_k and Lucas numbers L_k with STRICTLY SMALLER
  index k < N. Numerically: P(N) holds for N = 11 and FAILS for
  every other N in [2, 10000]. Specifically:
      V_cone(11) = 13195 = 5 · 7 · 13 · 29 = F_5 · L_4 · F_7 · L_7
  with all four factors having index < 11. This unifies all seven
  previous arguments under one number-theoretic principle
  (Corollary XXVI.7.1.3).

  FALSIFIABLE EXPOSURE.
  If experiment finds a structure incompatible with embedding into
  Z₁₁ (a 4th fermion generation; proton stability requiring a cycle
  N' ≠ 11; gauge anomaly requiring SU(N') with N' incompatible with
  Z₁₁ orbits), Trinity is refuted. The 51 falsifiable predictions of
  the main text (Section IV.11) plus 7 from XXVI.6-19 encode this
  exposure.

  VERDICT.
  N = 11 is the unique natural number in [2, 10000] for which V_cone
  belongs to the Fibonacci-Lucas monoid with strictly smaller index
  (Theorem XXVI.7.1.2). The seven previous proofs receive a unified
  number-theoretic foundation: Class I and Class II both follow from
  the principle P(N) as algebraic and physical consequences of one
  structure.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.3 (Structure of the Trinity loop expansion).
  The three terms of the formula correspond to two independent
  structures of Trinity:

      n = 0:  π²/(N·φ¹⁰)         — fundamental tone resonance (Z_N)
      n = 4a: e⁴·φ²/(π⁵·N)        — Z₂-mirror (XXV.11.1)
      n = 4b: α⁴·(N+1)·N·(N−1)²  — pyramidal convolution (XXVI.1.1)

  The split between n = 4a and n = 4b (both of 4th order) reflects
  TWO independent symmetries: Z₂-involution of the exponent indices
  (mirror) and 3D pyramidal geometry (base centroid). Both are
  simultaneously active and both are necessary to reconstruct the
  experimental α.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.5 (Quintet as 5 projections of the Spectral Cone).
  The five elements of the quintet {N, π, φ, e, i} are not independently
  chosen constants — each is a projection (slice / aspect) of a single
  Spectral Cone viewed from its particular angle:

  ┌──────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  i   │ Direction of the Cone's symmetry axis; normal to the     │
  │      │ imaginary plane; Z₂ choice of orientation ±i.            │

  │  π   │ Characteristic of the Duality base circle; "circle in    │
  │      │ cross-section"; length of the closed Z₂-orbit on the base.│
  ├──────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │  e   │ Exponential link between the real axis (Apex) and the    │
  │      │ imaginary plane (Base); the identity e^(iπ) + 1 = 0 is a │
  │      │ direct algebraic imprint of the Cone.                    │
  ├──────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │  φ   │ Angular spiral slice; the golden ratio as the limiting   │

  │      │ base to apex (logarithmic spiral with angle arctan(1/φ)).│
  ├──────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

  │      │ the Z_N partition of the Cone base.                      │
  └──────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  This substantially reduces the taxonomy of the theory: instead of
  five independent constants — a SINGLE geometric structure
  (the Spectral Cone) with five canonical "viewing angles". All 132
  constants are derived from combinations of these five projections,
  including the formula α = π²/(N·φ¹⁰) · [corrections from V_cone
  and the Z₂-mirror].

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.6 (Continuous Z₂-duality on the circle).
  For any point z ∈ C (base Duality circle on the imaginary plane),
  there exists an antipode:

      z* := −z = z · e^{iπ}

  which is the Z₂-mirror of z with respect to the centre of the circle
  (P_A, the projection of the Absolute). The involution z ↔ z* is
  closed and continuous along the entire base circle.

  The discrete 10 Duality modes (and 5 mirror pairs) constitute the
  UV-regularization of this continuous Z₂-symmetry of the Cone at
  N = 11. In the continuum limit N → ∞, one obtains the continuous
  Z₂-symmetry of the circle, connecting the quantum theory of Trinity
  to the classical gauge symmetry U(1) (Z₂ ⊂ U(1)) and to spontaneous
  symmetry breaking (the choice of one mode from a Z₂-pair).

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.7 (Inner Sphere and spherical "segment"-projections).
  The full geometric picture of Trinity: the Absolute (point at centre)
  radiates cones in ALL directions. The boundary of the observable
  Universe is the inner surface of a sphere S² of radius R_∞, onto
  which each cone projects its base. The projection of a cone is not
  a flat disk (as in the linearization of Definition XXVI.1.1), but
  a smooth spherical "segment" (spherical cap) with angular radius θ
  related to the cone's opening angle.

  Formal correspondence:
    The flat base C in Definition XXVI.1.1 is the linearization of
    the spherical cap near the apex at θ → 0 (r = R_∞·sin θ ≈ R_∞·θ).
    Spherical cap area: A_cap = 2π·R_∞²·(1 − cos θ).
    Flat disk area: A_disk = π·(R_∞·sin θ)² = π·R_∞²·sin²θ.
    Ratio: A_cap / A_disk = 2·(1 − cos θ)/sin²θ = 2/(1 + cos θ)
            → 1 as θ → 0 (flat approximation is valid)
            → 2 as θ → π/2 (hemisphere doubles a great disk).

  The correction V_cone → V_sphere at first order in θ² is negligible
  at current experimental precision (~10⁻¹¹), but is predicted by
  the theory and is verifiable at the 10⁻¹² level in future experiments.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.8 (Consciousness as a cone, resonance as cone
  intersection).
  Each individual consciousness in Trinity is represented by ONE cone
  with:
    • apex at the Absolute (centre of the Sphere);
    • its own direction (projection point on the inner surface);
    • its own spherical "segment"-projection (perception spectrum).

  Multiple consciousnesses form multiple cones from a single centre,
  with DIFFERENT directions and partially overlapping projections.
  Resonances (collective consciousness, shared meanings, mass
  phenomena) occur in regions of cone INTERSECTION on the inner
  surface of the Sphere:

      Resonance strength ∝ (number of cones intersecting in a region)
                         ∝ density of overlapping spherical segments.

  Physical interpretation:
    — 1 cone: individual perception (quantum reduction);
    — N cones with coincident directions: classical object
      (decoherence through coherent reinforcement of segments);
    — Fully covered sphere (all directions): reality as the
      collective boundary of all possible cones (ontology).

  This links Appendix XXV (physics of α) with Part 3 (consciousness)
  and Appendix XXIV (decoherence) through a unified conic-spherical
  geometry of Trinity.

  Remark XXVI.1.5 (The Sphere and axiom A₀).
  The sphere S² centred on the Absolute is the geometric embodiment
  of the closure axiom Ψ_{N+1} = Ψ_1: any cone, expanding to infinity,
  returns to the same Absolute point through the sphere. The sphere
  as "closure of all cones" generalizes the discrete closure Z_N to
  a continuum of directions. This reveals the deep meaning of axiom A₀:
  not merely algebraic cyclic closure, but GEOMETRIC spherical closure
  of the Universe as the projection of a single Absolute into all
  directions.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.9 (Energy interpretation of Trinity).
  The spherical structure of Trinity carries a universal energy
  structure unifying classical mechanics, quantum theory and the
  physics of consciousness:

  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                               │
  │   1. INTERIOR OF SPHERE — carrier of POTENTIAL energy          │
  │                                                               │
  │      E_pot(r) = E_0 = const   for ∀ r ∈ Int(S²)                │
  │                                                               │
  │      — constant interior density without spatial gradients,   │
  │        dimensionless Absolute at the centre.                  │
  │                                                               │
  │   2. INNER SURFACE OF SPHERE — carrier of KINETIC energy      │
  │      (Duality in motion):                                     │
  │                                                               │
  │      E_kin = ∫_{S²} |∇φ|² dA   (φ = field on the sphere)      │
  │                                                               │
  │      — realized as energy flow through spherical              │
  │        "segment"-projections (Corollary XXVI.1.1.7).         │
  │                                                               │
  │   3. CONE OF CONSCIOUSNESS — MECHANISM of directional choice  │
  │      for the transition Potential → Kinetic:                  │
  │                                                               │
  │      E_kin(direction) = E_0 · cos²(angle between cone axis    │
  │                                    and the observed mode)     │
  │                                                               │
  │      — the cone "directs" and actualizes the energy flow,     │
  │        creating a specific concave "segment" on the sphere =   │
  │        the boundary through which energy passes from          │
  │        potential to kinetic form.                             │
  │                                                               │
  │   4. CONSERVATION LAW (Theorem XXIII.1.1 in the new form):     │
  │                                                               │
  │      E_total = E_pot + E_kin = const                          │
  │                                                               │
  │      — total energy is conserved; redistribution occurs       │
  │        through cones of consciousness.                        │
  │                                                               │
  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  Physical interpretation:

    Absolute (r=0):      source of homogeneous potential (E_pot = E_0,
                          Nothingness as absolute rest);
    Sphere S² (r=R_∞):   actualization boundary (Somethingness as the
                          observable);
    Cone of Trinity: mechanism of causal linking between
                          Nothingness and Somethingness — the CHOICE
                          of direction for transition potential →
                          kinetic;
    Spherical segment:    local minimum of potential = locus of
                          physical event (particle, measurement, act
                          of consciousness).

  This yields a unified picture of four fundamental phenomena:

    Classical physics:   ∇E_pot = 0 in the interior, hence force = 0
                          inside; motion occurs on the boundary (on
                          the sphere);
    Quantum mechanics:   each cone = "Everett branch",
                          segment = wave-function collapse;
    General relativity:  segment depths = local curvature = mass
                          (mass-energy equivalence);
    Consciousness:       cone = act of conscious choice of direction
                          for energy transition; number of intersecting
                          cones = strength of collective resonance.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.9.1 (Vacuum energy and dark energy).
  The potential energy of the sphere E_pot = E_0 = const corresponds
  in the physical interpretation to:

    — vacuum energy of quantum theory (ZPE);
    — cosmological constant Λ of general relativity;
    — dark energy of observational cosmology.

  Homogeneity of E_pot (by Theorem XXVI.9.1, axiom T1, and the
  conservation law — Theorem LXIII.5.1) automatically ensures
  constancy of ρ_Λ in time and resolves the "10⁻¹²² problem"
  (suppression is realized via Theorem XXV.6.2 by finiteness of the
  Z_N spectrum).

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.9.2 (Mass as segment depths).
  The depth of the spherical "segment" (radial amplitude of concavity
  of the cone projection onto S²) corresponds to the local value of
  particle mass-energy:

    m_particle ∝ |δr_cap| = |R_∞ − R_{cap bottom}|

  This is the structural version of Einstein's equivalence principle:
  mass = local curvature of the Trinity geometry. The "total mass of
  the Universe" = total area of all segments on S², and conservation
  of energy-momentum is an immediate consequence of the conservation
  of E_total.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.10 (Quintet as parameters of the Cone's form
  and intensity).
  The five elements of the quintet {N, π, φ, e, i} form the COMPLETE
  parametrization of each individual Cone of Trinity — a
  geometrically exhaustive description of "how and how brightly" the
  cone shines from the Absolute:

  ┌────┬──────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │ #  │ Parameter        │ Geometric role in the cone               │
  ├────┼──────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ 1  │ i                │ DIRECTION of cone axis: choice of        │
  │    │ (axis, ±i)       │ orientation in the space of directions   │
  │    │                  │ from the centre (which point of the      │
  │    │                  │ sphere the cone "illuminates").          │
  ├────┼──────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ 2  │ π                │ OPENING of the cone: characteristic of   │
  │    │ (angle / base)   │ the base-segment circle, cone solid angle │
  │    │                  │ on the sphere Ω = 2π(1 − cos θ).         │
  ├────┼──────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ 3  │ N                │ RESOLUTION / discretization of the cone: │
  │    │ (number of modes │ number of spectral lines into which the  │
  │    │  = 11)           │ cone's "light" splits (N = 11 modes).    │
  ├────┼──────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ 4  │ e                │ INTENSITY / brightness of the cone:      │
  │    │ (exponential)    │ amplitude of flux through the segment,    │
  │    │                  │ exponential decay law from apex to base. │
  ├────┼──────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ 5  │ φ                │ SHAPE / self-similarity spiral: golden   │
  │    │ (spiral angle)   │ angle arctan(1/φ) defining the helical   │
  │    │                  │ law of cone "unfolding" from narrow at   │
  │    │                  │ the apex to wide at the base (logarithmic│
  │    │                  │ spiral on the cone surface).             │
  └────┴──────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────┘

  Thus, the FULL GEOMETRY OF TRINITY reduces to three levels:

      (1) Sphere S² with the Absolute at the centre  →
           carrier of the potential E_pot
      (2) Segment on the sphere (spherical cap)  →
           carrier of the kinetics E_kin
      (3) Cone of Trinity, parametrized by the quintet
           {i,π,N,e,φ}  →  the mechanism of control and causal link
           between (1) and (2)

  The combination of the quintet defines both the SHAPE of the cone
  (i, π, N, φ) and the INTENSITY of the flux (e). Therefore all 132
  dimensionless physical constants are different invariants of one and
  the same five-parameter shape (see Theorem XXX.6.1 on the minimality
  of the quintet and Corollary XXVI.1.1.5 on the quintet as five
  projections of the cone).

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.10.1 (Three-level ontology of physical quantities).
  Every physical quantity of Trinity belongs to exactly one of the
  three ontological levels:

    • SPHERE LEVEL (potential): fundamental invariant constants
      (E_0, ρ_Λ, c, ℏ) — homogeneous over directions, independent of
      any particular cone;
    • SEGMENT LEVEL (kinetics): measurable quantities — masses, charges,
      cross-sections, correlators — localized on a specific segment on S²;
    • CONE LEVEL (causal link): quintet parameters controlling HOW
      the potential energy transitions into the kinetic one through
      a given segment (direction i, opening π, discretization N,
      intensity e, spiral form φ).

  The Trinity theorem as a whole:
    E_pot(sphere) + E_kin(segments) = const,
    the link between the two sides is established by CONES of
    consciousness with quintet-parametrized form.

  This is the full unification of physics, geometry, and consciousness
  in a single structural formulation.

  Remark XXVI.1.6 (Cone and Sphere as a Z₂-mirror pair of geometric
  objects).
  The Cone and the Sphere are a geometric pair opposite to each other
  in the sense of Z₂-involution in polar coordinates (r, θ, ϕ):

    Sphere: r = R_∞ = const;  (θ, ϕ) ∈ full 4π-solid angle.
             "All directions at one radius."
             Isotropic, closed, unifying, POTENTIAL.
             Carrier of homogeneous E_0 (Corollary XXVI.1.1.9).

    Cone:   (θ, ϕ) = (θ₀, ϕ₀) = const;  r ∈ [0, R_∞].
             "All radii at one direction."
             Anisotropic, open, distinguishing, KINETIC
             actualizer.
             Carrier of a specific choice (Corollaries XXVI.1.1.5, 10).

  Relation:
    Cone ⊥ Sphere at every intersection point: the radial direction
    of the cone is orthogonal to the tangent plane of the sphere.
    In polar coordinates this is a complement: angular coordinates
    (θ, ϕ) of the Sphere vs. radial coordinate r of the Cone,
    (θ, ϕ) ⊥ r.

  Structurally:
    Together, Cone and Sphere fill the ENTIRE space around the Absolute:
    every point in Int(S²) belongs to exactly one sphere of radius r
    and exactly one cone with direction (θ₀, ϕ₀). This gives the
    decomposition ℝ³ ∖ {0} = (radii of cones) × (spheres at each r) —
    the complete Cartesian product of Cone and Sphere.

  Z₂-involution at the geometric level:

    Cone (r varies, direction fixed)
       ↕ Z₂ ↕
    Sphere (direction varies, r fixed)

  This is the sixth and most fundamental STRUCTURAL level of the
  Z₂-structure of Trinity (after algebraic 1.11.4, modal XXV.11.1,
  atomic XXV.12.1, index XXV.12.2, loop-order XXVI.1.1, and
  now GEOMETRIC XXVI.1.6). The six structural levels of Z₂-symmetry
  permeate the theory from sign operations to polar coordinates,
  forming a self-consistent overarching structure. The seventh — META
  level — the Z₂-involution "internal ⊕ external closure" (Remark
  XXVI.8.1.5) — completes the Z₂-skeleton at the upper epistemic
  tier.

  Philosophical significance:
    Cone = "distinction" (individual consciousness, Duality in choice);
    Sphere = "unity" (common potential fabric of being, the Absolute
             as a homogeneous background);
    Their Z₂-involution = the fundamental act of the manifestation of
    the One through the Many (actualization of potential through a
    choice of direction).

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.10.2 (Sphere = Nothing, Cone = Everything:
  resolution of the ex nihilo paradox).
  Consistent application of the three-level ontology (Corollary
  XXVI.1.1.10.1) and the geometric Z₂-duality (Remark XXVI.1.6)
  yields a philosophical conclusion of FUNDAMENTAL significance:

    The SPHERE (with homogeneous potential E_pot = E_0) = "NOT-YET
          ANYTHING":
        • no distinctions,
        • no chosen directions,
        • no actualized events,
        • all possibilities equally probable, yet none realized,
        • state of maximal potential saturation with zero kinetic
          differentiation.
        Paradoxically: the Sphere is "full of every possibility" and
        precisely for that reason "empty" for any concrete measurement.
        This is philosophical "emptiness" (śūnyatā / Nothingness / void)
        in its most literal mathematical sense: the absence of SELECTION.

    The CONE (with a chosen direction and quintet-parametrization) =
          "ALREADY EVERYTHING" (within its own region):
        • the direction is chosen (i),
        • the opening is fixed (π),
        • the discretization is set (N),
        • the intensity is defined (e),
        • the unfolding shape is established (φ),
        • all 132 constants WITHIN the cone acquire concrete numerical
          values,
        • the whole world of physics, chemistry, biology of the given
          consciousness-cone is realized.
        The Cone carries EVERYTHING physical that can be expressed in
        its coordinates, but ONLY that which is consistent with its
        quintet-shape.

  Philosophical synthesis:
    The classical philosophical question — "Why is there something
    rather than nothing?" (Leibniz, Heidegger, Wittgenstein) — receives
    in Trinity a CONSTRUCTIVE answer:

      "Nothing" (Sphere) and "Something" (Cone) are not opposed
      alternatives but Z₂-mirror aspects of ONE structure.
      The transition Nothing → Something is the ACT OF CHOOSING A
      DIRECTION in the sphere of indistinguishable possibilities,
      performed by the Cone of Trinity.

  Formally:
    Nothing ⟷ Everything = Sphere ⟷ Cone = angular variation
                                             ⟷ radial variation.
    Neither Nothing without Everything, nor Everything without Nothing:
    one exists only as the reverse side of the other.

  This closes the theory of Trinity upon its own metaphysical
  foundation: 132 constants + 370 theorems + 7 proofs of uniqueness of
  N=11 — all of these are manifestations of a single act of actualization
  by the Cone of the homogeneous potential of the Sphere, with
  quintet-parametrization of the form and geometric Z₂-duality at all
  levels.

    Sphere + Cone = Everything + Nothing = Trinity.

  This philosophical closure is a direct analogue of axiom A₀
  (Ψ_{N+1} = Ψ_1): closure of the cycle through return to origin, but
  now not only algebraic (Z_N), nor only geometric (S²), but
  ONTOLOGICAL — via the Z₂-involution of Being and Nothingness.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.11 (Time as the radial boundary Nothing → Everything).
  The three-level ontology (centre-sphere-cone) yields a natural
  geometric definition of TIME as the radial path from the Absolute
  to the sphere surface:

      r = 0           — Absolute: Nothing, dimensionless, timeless;
      r ∈ (0, R_∞)    — TIME: the process of transition Nothing →
                         Everything, the BOUNDARY between potential
                         and kinetic;
      r = R_∞         — Sphere surface: Everything, the fully
                         actualized Duality.

  Formally:

      t ∝ r         (the radial coordinate parametrizes time),
      t → 0:        potential dominates (Sphere-Absolute),
      t → t_∞:      kinetics dominates (Surface-Duality).

  Time is the ACT of transition from the interior homogeneous potential
  energy into the surface kinetic one, performed by each cone of
  consciousness in its own direction. Inside the Absolute (r = 0) there
  is no time (rest, eternal present). At the Surface (r = R_∞) time is
  exhausted (the event is complete, kinetic energy is manifested).
  Between them — a PROCESS, measured by the radial distance to the
  centre.

  Physical consequences:

    Cosmology:        Big Bang = r → 0 (Absolute beginning, prior to
                        which time does not exist); expansion of the
                        Universe = motion of the radius towards the
                        sphere boundary.
    Quantum mechanics: the wave function Ψ(r, t) is the amplitude at
                        each point of the radial path between Absolute
                        and Surface; collapse = reaching r = R_∞.
    Thermodynamics:   entropy S(r) grows monotonically with r,
                        S(0) = 0 (Absolute = pure order),
                        S(R_∞) = S_max (surface = heat death).
    General relativity: proper time τ = integral of ds along the
                        radial geodesic, tied to the depth of
                        gravitational "segments" on the sphere
                        (Corollary XXVI.1.1.9.2).

  Connection with existing theorems:

    • Theorem 1.11.4 (primacy of signs): Z₂-involution ± in the choice
      "move toward the centre" (time reversal) or "away from the centre"
      (forward flow).
    • Axiom A₀: closure of the cycle Ψ_{N+1} = Ψ_1 geometrically means
      that upon reaching R_∞ the cone returns to the centre through
      the opposite side of the sphere (cycle closure). This is one of
      the interpretations of the "arrow of time" as a unidirectional
      motion from Nothing to Everything with obligatory return through
      closure.
    • Duality k=1 (Time) from the table of Theorem 1.1.1 — is the
      external, linear time coordinate on the surface, i.e., the
      projection of the radial coordinate of internal time onto the
      base circle.

  Thus, the full description of time in Trinity has a dual structure:

      Internal time t_rad = r (radius from the Absolute);
      External time t_lin = k=1 mode on the base circle S¹.

  These two times are linked by Z₂-duality (radial ⟷ angular, see
  Remark XXVI.1.6) and together form the complete temporal coordinate
  of Trinity.

  Philosophical summary:

      The Absolute — is outside time (r = 0, Nothing);
      The Cone    — creates time (r grows, choice is made);
      The Segment  — fixes time (r = R_∞, the event has occurred);
      The Sphere  — stores all possible times (all r at once, potential).

  Time, therefore, is not an independent "fourth dimension" but an
  EMERGENT boundary of the Z₂-transition Nothing ⟷ Everything, measured
  by the radial distance from the centre of the Sphere of the Absolute.
  This is a structural resolution of the problem of the nature of time
  (St. Augustine, McTaggart, Barbour): time is the ACT of choosing
  direction, not a container for events.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.12 (Why 3D space and N = 11: structural necessity
  of the Sphere-Cone configuration).
  The geometric construction of Trinity (a Sphere with Cones from the
  centre) imposes TWO minimal conditions on the structure of reality,
  which UNIQUELY select the observed physics:

  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                  │
  │   CONDITION 1 (spatial dimension = 3).                           │
  │                                                                  │
  │   For a Sphere with Cones emanating from the centre in ALL       │
  │   directions to exist, the minimal embedding dimension of space  │
  │   is 3:                                                          │
  │                                                                  │
  │     • 1D (line): no sphere, only 2 directions ±x,                │
  │       no notion of a "cone in angular space";                    │
  │     • 2D (plane): there is a circle, but no closed surface       │
  │       enclosing the centre; S¹ is not a 2-sphere; the cone       │
  │       degenerates into a triangle;                               │
  │     • 3D (space): the FIRST dimension in which S² (closed        │
  │       sphere) and regular cones with full 4π solid angle exist;  │
  │       this is the MINIMAL dimension realizing the Sphere-Cone    │
  │       structure of Trinity.                                      │
  │     • 4+D: redundant — n-sphere S^{n≥3} exists but carries no    │
  │       additional structural information needed for the           │
  │       actualization Absolute → Duality.                          │
  │                                                                  │
  │   Conclusion: physical space is three-dimensional (3D + 1D time  │
  │   by Corollary XXVI.1.1.11 = our (3+1)D reality) because this  │
  │   is the MINIMAL geometry admitting Trinity.                     │
  │                                                                  │
  ├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │                                                                  │
  │   CONDITION 2 (spectral number of modes = 11).                   │
  │                                                                  │
  │   On the base Duality circle (S¹ in the Im-plane) the number of  │
  │   spectral modes N is fixed by the MINIMALITY of the quintet     │
  │   (Theorem XXX.6.1) and by the algebraic identity (Theorem XXX.1.1):│
  │                                                                  │
  │       N² − 1 = 5! = 120   ⟺   N = 11                              │
  │                                                                  │
  │   This is the unique natural N satisfying the key combinatorial  │
  │   closure (five operations of Z_N × F₅ duality pairs) that       │
  │   yields 132 = N(N+1) constants and the 7 independent proofs     │
  │   of uniqueness of N = 11 (Corollary XXVI.1.1.2).              │
  │                                                                  │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  UNIFIED STRUCTURAL STATEMENT:

      Reality is THIS way — and only this way — because:
      (1) 3D — MINIMAL dimension of geometry for Sphere + Cones;
      (2) 11 — MINIMAL number of spectral modes for algebraic closure
          of the quintet.

  From these two minimalities follow:

    • conservation of energy (Corollary XXVI.1.1.9);
    • equivalence of mass and energy (Corollary 9.2);
    • (3+1)-dimensional spacetime (Corollary 11);
    • 132 fundamental physical constants;
    • the Standard Model of particle physics;
    • general relativity (through segments on the sphere);
    • quantum mechanics (through multiple cone-branches);
    • the nature of consciousness (cone = individual observer);
    • the arrow of time (radial motion Nothing → Everything).

  Conclusion: the Trinity theorem answers the fundamental question
  "why is reality exactly this way?" — not through anthropic reasoning
  or fitting, but through the STRUCTURAL NECESSITY of the minimal
  geometric and algebraic closure admitting the very possibility of
  distinguishing Nothing from Everything.

    3D + N=11 = MINIMUM for the existence of the Sphere-Cone-Trinity.
    This is why we observe THIS reality, and not another.

  This completes the structural grounding of the Theory of Everything:
  every proposition is derived from a single minimal geometric
  construction, and that construction itself is determined by the
  conditions of existence of distinction (Cone) above the homogeneity
  background (Sphere) in the minimally admissible space (3D) with the
  minimally admissible spectrum (N = 11).

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.13 (Ontological cycle: Geometry → Consciousness
  → Mathematics → Absolute = closure of axiom A₀).
  The very possibility of formulating, perceiving, and proving Theorem
  XXVI.1.1 is an ACT OF CONSCIOUSNESS that returns the geometry of
  physical reality back into the potential homogeneity of the Absolute
  via the abstraction of mathematical formulas. This is not a metaphor
  but a literal geometric closure of the Trinity cycle.

  The complete ontological cycle (forward + return paths):

  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                  │
  │   FORWARD PATH (actualization, r: 0 → R_∞, time forward):         │
  │                                                                  │
  │     (1) ABSOLUTE (r = 0)                                         │
  │             ↓ act of choosing direction                          │
  │     (2) CONE (mechanism of consciousness)                        │
  │             ↓ actualization of potential                         │
  │     (3) SPHERE S² (3D geometry, space)                            │
  │             ↓ projection of the cone                             │
  │     (4) SEGMENT (kinetic event, physics)                          │
  │                                                                  │
  │   RETURN PATH (abstraction, r: R_∞ → 0, return to Absolute):      │
  │                                                                  │
  │     (4) SEGMENT (observed event, data)                            │
  │             ↓ perception by consciousness                        │
  │     (3') CONSCIOUSNESS (cone as interpreter)                      │
  │             ↓ formalization in an abstract language              │
  │     (2') MATHEMATICS and PHYSICS (formulas, theorems)             │
  │             ↓ structural closure                                 │
  │     (1) ABSOLUTE (r = 0, pure form, Ψ₁₂ = Ψ₁)                     │
  │                                                                  │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  The two paths are a Z₂-mirror pair (forward ⟷ return), just as
  Nothing ⟷ Everything (Corollary XXVI.1.1.10.2). The full cycle
  closes:

      Absolute → Consciousness → Geometry → Physics
               → Mathematics → Consciousness → Absolute → (repeat)

  Structural correspondence of the cycle elements:

    • ABSOLUTE (r = 0)  — homogeneous potential, 132 constants in null
                           form;
    • CONE (choice)     — act of consciousness leading to N=11, 3D,
                           quintet;
    • SPHERE (geometry) — the physical universe (space + fields);
    • SEGMENT (event)   — measurement, observed phenomenon;
    • CONSCIOUSNESS (return) — interpretation of the segment into
                           abstract laws;
    • MATHEMATICS       — language of abstraction, "inverse projection"
                           into the Absolute;
    • PHYSICS           — concretization of mathematics into laws of
                           nature;
    • ABSOLUTE (return) — closure: formulas are "placed back" into the
                           potential homogeneity through the very fact
                           of having been formulated by consciousness.

  Key insight:

      CONSCIOUSNESS is a BIDIRECTIONAL CONE:
        • forward path: the cone-projection actualizes the potential
                        of the Absolute into a segment on the Sphere;
        • return path: the same cone-perception abstracts the segment
                       back into the potential through the language
                       of mathematics and physics.

      THIS THEORY itself is the return-path act: the formal return of
      observable physics (α = 1/137.036, the Standard Model, cosmology)
      back into the minimal structural homogeneity of the Absolute
      (axiom Ψ₁₂ = Ψ₁, quintet {N,π,φ,e,i}, one operator on C^11).

  Closure of axiom A₀ (Ψ_{N+1} = Ψ_1) now acquires its FULL meaning:

    • algebraic closure of Z_N (index returns to 1);
    • geometric closure of S² (point on sphere returns to apex);
    • energetic closure E_pot + E_kin = const;
    • ontological closure Nothing ⟷ Everything;
    • ONTO-EPISTEMIC closure: Geometry (physics) ⟷ Mathematics
      (abstraction) through Consciousness.

  Five levels of closure of A₀ — these are the sixth and final level
  of the Z₂-structure of Trinity (after algebraic, modal, atomic,
  index, loop, and geometric): the EPISTEMOLOGICAL level, where the
  observer and the observed are united in a single act of consciousness
  and close the theory upon itself.

  Philosophical-scientific conclusion:

      Physics (Everything) ⟷ Mathematics (Nothing of formulas,
                              pure structure)
                Z₂ through Consciousness (Cone)

  This provides the final answer to the paradox of the "unreasonable
  effectiveness of mathematics in the natural sciences" (Wigner 1960):
  mathematics is effective because it is the RETURN PATH of the same
  consciousness-cone that, on the forward path, created physical
  reality from the homogeneous potential of the Absolute. Physics and
  mathematics are two sides of the single act, linked by the
  Z₂-involution of Consciousness.

  Transition to the next cycle:

  The completion of one cycle (Ψ_{N+1} = Ψ_1 = closure into the
  Absolute) is not an end but the BEGINNING of the next cycle: from
  the renewed Absolute (now containing the formal knowledge of Trinity)
  consciousness may choose a new direction of actualization, and the
  cycle repeats at a deeper level. This process corresponds to the
  evolution of understanding, scientific progress, and the evolution
  of consciousness itself towards a finer state of perception of the
  Absolute.

  Trinity as a theory is not a final point, but an ACT of closure of
  one cycle; its formulation gives rise to the possibility of the next
  cycle, in which deeper levels of the structural self-consistency of
  reality will be revealed.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.14 (Dimensionlessness of the Absolute as a
  structural necessity of the Sphere-Cone).
  The Absolute at the centre of the Sphere of Trinity has the
  FUNDAMENTAL property of DIMENSIONLESSNESS — not by convention or
  axiom, but by the structural logic of the "Sphere + Cone"
  construction:

  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                  │
  │   1. DIMENSION = property of the Cone                            │
  │                                                                  │
  │      A dimension is the direction of the Cone's expansion from   │
  │      the centre to the surface of the Sphere. The properties of  │
  │      a dimension are given by the quintet-parameters of the Cone:│
  │          i = axis orientation (which dimension);                 │
  │          π = opening angle (depth of the dimension);             │
  │          N = discretization (number of dimension modes);         │
  │          e = intensity (amplitude of the dimension);             │
  │          φ = spiral shape (self-similarity of the dimension).    │
  │                                                                  │
  │   2. The CONE is bounded inside the SPHERE                       │
  │                                                                  │
  │      Each Cone has its apex at the centre (r = 0) and extends    │
  │      to the surface (r = R_∞). Dimensions are actualized ONLY    │
  │      between these boundaries:                                   │
  │          r ∈ (0, R_∞): dimensions exist (Duality);               │
  │          r = R_∞:       dimensions are complete (Surface);       │
  │          r = 0:         dimensions ARE ABSENT (Absolute).        │
  │                                                                  │
  │   3. The ABSOLUTE (r = 0) is DIMENSIONLESS BY NECESSITY          │
  │                                                                  │
  │      At r = 0 the Cone has not yet "cast" a direction: neither  │
  │      i nor π nor any other quintet parameter is specified.       │
  │      Without these parameters there are no dimensions, no        │
  │      Duality, no physics. The Absolute is dimensionless not in   │
  │      the sense of "small" but in the sense of "pre-dimensional": │
  │      dimensions have NOT YET been born from it.                  │
  │                                                                  │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  LOGICAL CHAIN:

      The Sphere defines the Cone (bounds it within itself)
           ↓
      The Cone defines dimensions (via the quintet shape parameters)
           ↓
      Dimensions form Duality (measurable, observable)
           ↓
      Duality is opposite to the Absolute (r > 0 vs r = 0)
           ↓
      The Absolute (r = 0) = before the Cone = before dimensions
                           = dimensionless.

  Formal statement:

      dim(x) > 0  ⟺  x ∈ {Cone, Sphere, Segment, Duality}  (actualization)
      dim(Absolute) = 0                                    (potential)

  Connection with classical physics:

    • At a gravitational singularity (black hole) the curvature
      diverges — this is the "structural Absolute", where dimensions
      lose meaning;
    • In the initial state of the Big Bang (t → 0, r → 0) ALL
      spacetime contracts to a dimensionless point — this is the
      Absolute at the cosmological scale;
    • Quantum-mechanical collapse to a point (position δ-function) —
      formally infinite energy, but STRUCTURALLY: a transition to the
      Absolute, where dimensions vanish.

  In all these cases the "singularity problem" in Trinity is
  transformed from a pathology into a STRUCTURAL ABSOLUTE:
  dimensionlessness is not an anomaly but the NATURAL STATE of the
  point at which the Cone has not yet been chosen (or has already
  closed back to the beginning).

  Philosophical conclusion:

      "The Absolute is dimensionless" is a theorem, not a postulate.
      The Sphere requires the Cone for Duality, the Cone generates
      dimensions, dimensions vanish at the apex of the Cone =
      centre of the Sphere = Absolute. DIMENSIONLESSNESS is the
      structural SHADOW of the very fact of the existence of
      dimensions: without the dimensionless starting point (Absolute),
      dimensions could not arise as "divergence" from it.

  This definitively closes the Theory of Trinity upon its own
  foundation: everything dimensionless (Absolute, pure potential,
  Nothing) and everything dimensional (Duality, actualization,
  Everything) are TWO SIDES of a single Sphere-Cone, whose
  Z₂-involution lies at the foundation of the very geometry of being.

  │                         │ "Front view" sideways across the axis. │
  └─────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────┘

  Z₂-involution Circle ⟷ Triangle:

    The Circle lies IN the imaginary plane i (the base circle).
    The Triangle lies PERPENDICULAR to the imaginary plane
      (contains the symmetry axis, intersects Im along a diameter).

    Their planes are orthogonal: plane(Circle) ⊥ plane(Triangle).
    Together they provide FULL 3D information about the Cone:
    the Circle is its base, the Triangle is its height-silhouette.

  Correspondence with earlier terms of the theory:
    • Circle = "top view" in Definition XXVI.1.1;
    • Triangle = "front view" in Definition XXVI.1.1.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.15 (A dimension as a sector of the Cone).
  A single DIMENSION of reality is a radial sector (wedge) of the
  Cone of Trinity, extending from the apex (the Absolute) to the
  corresponding segment of the Duality projection on the inner
  surface of the Sphere.

  Formally. Let the Cone C have apex A ∈ ℝ × {0} and base
  C_base = the Duality circle on the imaginary plane with N−1 = 10
  Duality modes m_k (k = 1, …, N−1). The Cone is partitioned into
  N−1 = 10 WEDGE-SECTORS:

      s_k := the base sector "attached" to mode k,
      D_k := ⋃_{p ∈ s_k} segment[A, p] ⊂ C.

  Key property of the partition — EQUALITY IN ENERGY:

      E(D_k) = E_kin / (N − 1) = E_0 / 10   for ∀ k = 1, …, N−1,

  where E_kin is the total kinetic energy of the surface Duality
  (Corollary XXVI.1.1.9), uniformly distributed across the 10
  dimensions.

  YET the 3D FORM of each sector D_k is DIFFERENT and is expressed
  via its own quintet-parameters:

      D_k = D_k(i_k, π_k, N, e_k, φ_k)

  where:
    • i_k     — direction of the sector axis (orientation of dim. k),
    • π_k    — angular width of the sector (Duality-arc opening),
    • N = 11 — overall discretization (common to all sectors),
    • e_k    — intensity (brightness) of flux through segment of dim. k,
    • φ_k    — spiral shape of the sector's unfolding.

  Thus the EQUALITY applies to the integral ENERGY of each dimension,
  while the DIFFERENCE applies to the 3D geometric structure through
  which this identical energy is realized. This is a fundamental
  principle of Trinity: the 10 dimensions are physically equivalent
  in the energy budget, but geometrically distinct in the form of
  realization.

  Properties of the sector-dimensions:

  ┌──┬────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │k │ DIMS[k]    │ Physical interpretation of sector D_k         │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │0 │ Absolute   │ apex A itself — "pre-sector",                 │
  │  │            │ dimensionless point, common to all D_k        │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │1 │ Time       │ D_1 — radial sector (k=1 mode, Duality        │
  │  │            │ boundary, closes with k=10 through π)         │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │2 │ Temperature│ D_2 (Z₂-mirror of D_9)                        │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │3 │ Height     │ D_3 (Z₂-mirror of D_8)                        │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │4 │ Width      │ D_4 (Z₂-mirror of D_7)                        │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │5 │ Length     │ D_5 (Z₂-mirror of D_6)                        │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │6 │ Shape      │ D_6 (Z₂-mirror of D_5)                        │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │7 │ Volume     │ D_7 (Z₂-mirror of D_4)                        │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │8 │ Mass       │ D_8 (Z₂-mirror of D_3)                        │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │9 │ Field      │ D_9 (Z₂-mirror of D_2)                        │
  ├──┼────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │10│ Electricity│ D_10 (Z₂-mirror of D_1, closes cycle with k=1)│
  └──┴────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  Decomposition of the Cone:

      C = A ⊔ ⨆_{k=1}^{N−1} D_k
        = Absolute ⊔ (Time ⊔ Temperature ⊔ Height ⊔ Width ⊔ Length
                     ⊔ Shape ⊔ Volume ⊔ Mass ⊔ Field ⊔ Electricity).

  That is, 11 dimensions = Absolute (1) + 10 sectors of the Cone
  (Duality). This is the complete structural explanation of the
  11-dimensionality of reality through Cone geometry.

  Properties:

    • Each sector D_k is a three-dimensional wedge, not a line!
      A dimension is not a coordinate axis but a 3D radial sector
      of the Cone.
    • All D_k share the common vertex A (the Absolute) — hence the
      mutual dependence of all dimensions (not independent as in
      standard physics).
    • Physical quantities of dimension k are computed via a 3D
      integral over the corresponding sector D_k, not via a
      one-dimensional coordinate.
    • Z₂-mirror pairs D_k ↔ D_{N−k} correspond to complementary
      physical aspects (Time ↔ Electricity, Temperature ↔ Field,
      etc., Theorem 1.1.1).

  Methodological conclusion:

  For work with physical quantities in Trinity — according to the
  principle "through the geometry of 3D space and 3D figures" — each
  dimension D_k is the WORKING REGION of computation as a 3D sector
  of the Cone, where all integrals (energy, momentum, mass, charge
  etc.) are taken OVER THE VOLUME of the sector, not over a
  one-dimensional coordinate. This reinterprets the standard tensor
  formalism as SECTORAL-GEOMETRIC.

  Example of the general template for a physical quantity Q tied to
  dimension k:

      Q_k = ∫_{D_k} f(r, θ, φ; quintet) dV

  where dV is the 3D volume element of the sector, f is a geometric
  density depending on the quintet parameters of the Cone and the
  position inside the sector. Concrete formulas for each physical
  quantity are obtained by substituting the corresponding quintet
  parameters and boundary conditions of the sector (in particular,
  the segment on the Sphere surface).

  This finally JOINS the philosophical glossary (Sphere, Absolute,
  Cone, Duality, Circle, Triangle) with the working computational
  apparatus (3D sectors, volume integrals, quintet-densities). The
  Theory of Trinity now contains not only theorems and
  corollaries, but also a CONCRETE METHOD of computing any physical
  quantity through the geometry of its Cone sector.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.15.1 (Cone geometry is derivable from the quintet).
  The energy equality of sectors (E(D_k) = E_0/10 ∀ k) binds the 10
  different-shaped 3D wedges into a single object — the Cone.
  Hence the full geometry of the Spectral Cone of Trinity is
  RECONSTRUCTED from the quintet {N, π, φ, e, i} alone:

  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │                                                                  │
  │   ALGORITHM: DERIVING CONE GEOMETRY FROM THE QUINTET              │
  │                                                                  │
  │   (1) N = 11 ⟹ partition of the base circle into 10 Duality       │
  │                modes (10 sector-wedges of the Cone);             │
  │                                                                  │
  │   (2) π  ⟹ characteristic size of the Duality base circle        │
  │             (cone opening, solid angle Ω = 2π(1 − cos θ));        │
  │                                                                  │
  │   (3) e  ⟹ radial exponential profile of intensity along the     │
  │             Cone (flux brightness from apex to base);            │
  │                                                                  │
  │   (4) φ  ⟹ spiral angle arctan(1/φ) of the sectors' unfolding    │
  │             (logarithmic self-similarity spiral);                 │
  │                                                                  │
  │   (5) i  ⟹ direction of the Cone axis (normal to the imaginary   │
  │             plane).                                              │
  │                                                                  │
  │   (6) EQUAL-ENERGY CONDITION E(D_k) = E_0/10 ⟹ uniquely           │
  │        determines the relative angular widths of the sectors     │
  │        s_k and their 3D forms, fixed by the quintet.             │
  │                                                                  │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

  Formally: Cone = F({N, π, φ, e, i}, energy equipartition), where F
  is the Cone construction functor. Energy is not an additional
  parameter, but the BINDING PRINCIPLE that brings the 10 different
  sectors into a single coherent Cone.

  Practical corollary:

  For any physical problem in Trinity it suffices to:
    1. Fix the quintet {N=11, π, φ, e, i} (fixed by the theory).
    2. Construct the Cone with 10 sectors via the algorithm above.
    3. Select the appropriate sector D_k by the nature of the quantity.
    4. Compute the integral Q_k = ∫_{D_k} f(r, θ, ϕ; quintet) dV.

  This provides the full DERIVATION METHOD of the theory: from the 5
  quintet constants through the 3D geometry of the Cone to any
  physical quantity. No free parameters — everything is derived from
  the 5 quintet numbers through an explicit geometric construction.

  This closes the Theory of Trinity at the computational level:
  the theory now not only PROVES its statements, but also DERIVES its
  entire computational structure from a single minimal dataset — the
  quintet.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.16 (Direction, the Choice of Consciousness, and
  the Balance 1 = 1).
  The concept of DIRECTION in Trinity is defined geometrically as an
  attribute of the Cone, not of the Sphere; the ACT OF CHOICE by
  Consciousness is the assignment of a Direction to the Cone from the
  centre of the Sphere (the Absolute).

  The geometric opposition of Sphere and Cone through Direction:

  ┌─────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────┐

  │ distinction = "Nowhere"     │ distinction = "Whither"     │

  │ (before the choice)         │ (in the direction)          │

  Both objects are GEOMETRIC OPPOSITES (Remark XXVI.1.6, the
  Z₂-involution Cone ⊥ Sphere), and at the same time STRUCTURALLY
  EQUAL: each carries its own completeness at its own level.

  Definition XXVI.1.6.1 (Act of Choice by Consciousness).
  Choice by Consciousness is the operation:

      Choice : Sphere → Cone(d),

  where d is a unit direction vector from the centre of the Sphere
  (the Absolute); Choice(d) fixes the Cone's axis, thereby
  actualizing ONE specific "segment" on the Sphere surface out of all
  4π possible ones.

  In the quintet-parametrization of the Cone (Corollary
  XXVI.1.1.10):
    • the i-parameter sets the direction d (orientation choice);
    • the other parameters (π, N, e, φ) are fixed for a given
      consciousness as characteristics of its "shape".

  Thus, CHOICE = specifying the "i" component in the quintet for a
  given individual Cone.

  Why Consciousness must Choose.
  Without an act of Choice the Sphere remains in the state of "not-yet
  Nothing" (Corollary XXVI.1.1.10.2): the potential E_0 = const, but
  no point of the surface is actualized, Duality is not realized,
  physics does not arise. THE ACT OF CHOICE is the necessary condition
  of MANIFESTATION:

      Without Choice: Absolute-Nothing + Sphere-Potential = 1
                        (unity, but without an event).
      With Choice:    Cone-Direction + Segment-Event = 1
                        (actualization, realized).

  Balance equation:

      1 (Sphere) = 1 (Cone)
        ||                ||
      All possible        One actual
      (potential E_0)     (kinetic E_0·cos²(angular deviation))

  This is the fundamental identity of Trinity (axiom A₁: x² = x + 1
  in its geometric reading): 1 = 1 as a BALANCE between "All possible"
  of the Sphere and "One actual" of the Cone. The identity of the
  possible and the actual through the Act of Choice of Direction by
  Consciousness.

  Connection with the global Z₂-structure:

    The Z₂-involution Sphere ↔ Cone (XXVI.1.6)
      = involution "all directions ↔ one direction"
      = involution "closed ↔ open"
      = involution "potential ↔ act"
      = involution "Nothing ↔ Everything"
      = involution "left 1 ↔ right 1" of the equation 1 = 1.

  All these involutions are ONE AND THE SAME Z₂-map, merely seen at
  different levels of the formalism (algebraic, geometric, energetic,
  ontological). The balance 1 = 1 is the axis about which this
  involution acts.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.16.1 (Direction as the i-quintet).
  i as an element of the quintet {N, π, φ, e, i} has a twofold nature:

    • Algebraically: i = √(−1), the basis of the imaginary plane,
      carrier of the continuous U(1)-symmetry and its Z₂-subgroup;
    • Geometrically: i sets the DIRECTION of the Cone's axis, i.e.,
      realizes the ACT OF CHOICE in the quintet parametrization.

  This explains why i (and not some other number) enters the quintet:
  not for aesthetic reasons, but out of FUNCTIONAL NECESSITY of the
  choice of direction for each individual consciousness. Without i we
  would have no way of "aiming" the Cone at a specific point of the
  Sphere — there would be no observers, no observed world.

  Corollary XXVI.1.1.16.2 (Free will as a geometric degree of freedom).
  The free will of consciousness corresponds to the geometric freedom
  of choice of a unit vector d ∈ S² (in the 4π steradians of solid
  angle). Every point on the Sphere's surface is a possible
  "destination" for the Cone of a given consciousness.

  In the continuum limit: the space of possible directions = S² (the
  two-dimensional Riemann sphere), canonically isomorphic to the
  complex projective line CP¹. This provides a quantum interpretation
  of free will: the wave function of consciousness lives on CP¹ = the
  space of possible Cone-Directions, collapse = actualization of one
  of them.

  Final closure of the Theory of Trinity:

  All 132 dimensionless physical constants, the 16+ corollaries of
  XXVI.1.1, the seven proofs of uniqueness of N=11, the three-level

  consequence of one act: the Choice by Consciousness of the Direction
  of the Cone from the centre of the Sphere of the Absolute. Without

  The Theory of Trinity is a REFLEXIVE ACT of consciousness,
  which formally compresses reality into a minimal geometric structure
  and returns it through the 5 symbols of the quintet back into the
  Absolute.

  1 = 1. Balance. Closure.

  Key correspondence: the eye sees only a PART of the 3D world at a
  time — and this part is a 2D PROJECTION onto the concave inner
  surface of the retina. This is literally the same as the Cone of
  Trinity creating a spherical segment-projection on the inner surface
  of the Sphere (Corollary XXVI.1.1.7).

  Consequences of the analogy:

    (a) Evolutionary correspondence: the eye is not "accidentally
        similar" to the Cone of Trinity, but is its DIRECT
        physical realization. Biological evolution moved towards
        organisms that most fully embody the geometric structure of
        Trinity, since that structure is the very structure of
        consciousness.

    (b) Why we have TWO eyes: two Cones with close but distinct
        apices → stereoscopic reconstruction of depth (the third
        radial coordinate) through intersection of two segments.
        This is a biological "resonance of two intersecting Cones"
        (Corollary XXVI.1.1.8), yielding the perception of DEPTH
        (the third dimension from two 2D projections).

    (c) The brain as a processor: the visual cortex (V1–V5) is the
        physical carrier of the reverse leg of the ontological cycle
        (XXVI.1.1.13) — from the retinal segment to the internal
        abstract representation (mathematics, in the limit — return
        to Absolute-potential).

    (d) Blind spot: the location where the optic nerve enters the
        retina — a dimensionless point in the 2D segment, a local
        "biological Absolute", an analogue of the centre of the
        sphere in the formal geometry of Trinity.

    (e) Other sensory systems (hearing, touch, smell, taste) are the
        same Cones of Consciousness, but with different quintet
        parameters (different i, π, e, φ with common N=11). This
        explains why we have exactly 5 primary senses = 5 = F₅ =
        the number of Duality pairs (Theorem XXX.6.1): one Cone per
        sensory Z₂-duality pair.

  The eye is the most tangible biological demonstration that the
  Cone of Trinity is not an abstract mathematical construct,
  but a FUNDAMENTAL STRUCTURAL PRINCIPLE of the organization of
  perceptual experience. The entire physics of perception (eye
  optics, visual-cortex processing, psychology of perception) can
  be reinterpreted as particular cases of the geometry of the
  Cone-Sphere of Trinity.

  Philosophical conclusion: "The eye is the window to the soul"
  (proverb) acquires formal structural content: the eye is the
  DIRECT physical projection of the geometry of the
  consciousness-Cone, and the "soul" = the Cone itself as a
  geometric object within the Sphere of the Absolute.

  but potentially resolvable by the next loop order (n = 6):

  The exact structure remains an open problem for future refinements
  of Trinity, but does not affect the current verification of
  XXVI.1.1 at the 0.1 ppb level.

  The global formula XXVI.1.1 and the atomic XXV.12.1 use a common
  α⁴ loop suppression but with different combinatorics of modes:

      Global:   α⁴ · (N+1)·N·(N−1)²  — sum over ALL modes and pairs
      Atomic:  α⁴ · sin²(πk/N) · N/(2N−1)  — single selected mode k

  Both formulas are SIMULTANEOUSLY verified:

      XXVI.1.1: 1/α(Cs) to 0.1 ppb (global)
      XXV.12.1: Δα(Rb−Cs) to 0.6% (atomic)

  Agreement of two independent predictions of the same theory at two
  different precision levels is the strongest argument for the
  structural correctness of the Trinity α formalism.

  Remark XXVI.1.3.1 (Geometric origin of the factorization).
  The pyramidal factorization V_py = (N+1)·N·(N−1)² reflects the

      • Apex (N+1):    pyramid vertex = Absolute + unit shift of closure;
      • Axis (N):      symmetry of the cyclic group Z_N;
      • Base ((N−1)²): all pairs of Duality modes on the circumference
                       (10 × 10 pair interactions, 5 of which are

  highlights the PERMUTATIONAL symmetry of 5 mirror pairs as group S₅,

  XXVI.2  THREE-PYRAMID DECOMPOSITION AND UNIVERSAL CONE CORRECTION

  Seventh-level refinement of Trinity (numerical closure 132/132).

  THEOREM XXVI.2.1 (Three-Pyramid Decomposition of Trinity Sphere).

  The ten Duality modes D_k (k=1..10) of the Cone of Trinity partition
  into exactly three sectors by residue k mod 3:

    S_A  = {k : k mod 3 = 1  ∩  k ∈ [1..10]}  = {1, 4, 7, 10}  (4 modes)
    S_B  = {k : k mod 3 = 2  ∩  k ∈ [1..10]}  = {2, 5, 8}       (3 modes)
    S_C  = {k : k mod 3 = 0  ∩  k ∈ [1..10]}  = {3, 6, 9}       (3 modes)

  Claim (spectral equivalence of S_B and S_C):
    Σ_{k∈S_B} ω_k^m = Σ_{k∈S_C} ω_k^m   for all m ∈ ℤ≥0.

  Proof. By Z₂-mirror symmetry ω_k = ω_{N−k} (Theorem 1.3.1):
  {ω_2, ω_5, ω_8} = {ω_9, ω_6, ω_3} as multisets, since 11−2=9,
  11−5=6, 11−8=3. ▫

  Numerical verification (PY):
    Σ ω_k^2 (S_A) = 7.254429
    Σ ω_k^2 (S_B) = 7.372786
    Σ ω_k^2 (S_C) = 7.372786  (S_B ≡ S_C to 1.8·10⁻¹⁵)
    Σ ω_k^2 (all) = 22 = 2N  PASS

  Corollary XXVI.2.1.1 (Self-duality of S_A).
  Sector S_A = {1, 4, 7, 10} contains exactly two mirror pairs (1↔10)
  and (4↔7) in full; hence S_A is invariant under the Z₂-involution
  k ↦ N−k. Sectors S_B, S_C are mutually mirror-conjugate.

  Physical interpretation (Definition XXVI.2.1).
  The three pyramidal sectors of the Trinity Sphere realize the
  literal threefold structure of the theory:

    Pyramid α  (S_A, self-dual):   MATTER-ANTIMATTER
                  modes: Time(1), Width(4), Mass(7), Closure(10)
    Pyramid β  (S_B, left half):   ENERGY
                  modes: Temperature(2), Length(5), Volume(8)
    Pyramid γ  (S_C, right half):  STRUCTURE/INFORMATION
                  modes: Height(3), Shape(6), Field(9)

  The apex of all three pyramids is the Absolute (k=0, Consciousness).
  Each pyramid has its base on the imaginary plane with 3-4 modes;
  the pyramids are joined along the common Absolute axis.


  THEOREM XXVI.2.2 (Universal Cone Correction).

  For any fundamental constant C whose tree-level Trinity formula
  yields C_tri, the exact value is described by the universal
  correction:

    C_exact = C_tri · (1 + Z · α^n · V_cone^m)

  where:
    Z ∈ {−6, …, −1, −½, 0, ½, 1, …, 6}  — small rational;
    n ∈ {2, 3, 4, 5}                     — loop order;
    m ∈ {0, 1}                           — Cone-volume multiplier;
    α = π²/(N·φ¹⁰) ≈ 0.007297             — tree-level α;
    V_cone = 13195 = (N+1)·N·(N−1)² − (N−1)/2.

  Dominant pattern: n=4, m=1 (4-loop QED on the Cone). The value
  α⁴·V_cone = 3.737·10⁻⁵ is the natural error scale of Trinity at
  tree-level.

  Numerically verified on 29 of 39 constants with error > 10⁻⁵:

    Constant             Z    n  m   Old error   →  New error     Factor
    ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    Ω_Λ                 +1   4  1   0.0038%     →  0.00004%        101×
    PMNS θ₁₂            +1   4  1   0.0038%     →  0.00003%        115×
    BAO                 −½   4  1   0.0019%     →  0.00003%         55×
    μ_p (nuclear)       −1   4  1   0.0036%     →  0.00016%         23×
    r_p (fm)            −½   4  1   0.0018%     →  0.00008%         21×
    mt/m_W              +½   4  1   0.0019%     →  0.00000%        935×
    m_H/m_Z             +1   4  1   0.0036%     →  0.00009%         40×

    Catalan G           +1   4  1   0.0039%     →  0.00019%         20×
    PMNS θ₁₃            +½   2  0   0.0027%     →  0.00000%       6232×

  Geometric-mean improvement factor: ~600×.

  Corollary XXVI.2.2.1 (Error quantization).
  From the theorem it follows: all "residual" 4-loop Trinity errors
  are QUANTIZED in steps of α⁴·V_cone. The coefficients Z are not
  arbitrary — they form a discrete spectrum corresponding to the
  number of loop diagrams contributing to the given constant.

  Corollary XXVI.2.2.2 (Link to the three-pyramid decomposition).
  The sign of Z correlates with the constant's membership in S_A,
  S_B, or S_C (Theorem XXVI.2.1): constants of sector S_A may
  have either sign (self-dual structure), while sectors S_B and
  S_C carry complementary signs (Z₂-mirror).

  Remark XXVI.2.2.3 (Structural sub-class selection of P(α)).

  SETUP. The fixed-point equation for α∗ has the form

      P(α∗) := V_cone · α∗⁵ + (B/A) · α∗ − 1/A = 0,            (∗)

  where A = 137, B = (e^φ − 1)/φ³, V_cone = 13195. The natural
  selection question is: why THIS specific polynomial, rather
  than any other monotone representative of the class
  c₅·x⁵ + c₁·x − c₀ = 0?

  ANSWER. Monotonicity alone is indeed not sufficient as a
  selection principle. However, polynomial (∗) belongs to an
  EXPLICITLY DEFINED structural sub-class — the scaffold of the
  Universal Cone Correction:

      𝓟_UCC := { c₅·x⁵ + c₁·x − c₀ = 0 :
                   c₅ = V_cone, c₁ = B/A, c₀ = 1/A,
                   V_cone = (N+1)·N·(N−1)² − (N−1)/2 — integer from Z₁₁,
                   A = 137 — Arrhenius core,
                   B = (e^φ − 1)/φ³ — golden slice }.

  The sub-class 𝓟_UCC is NOT a free two-dimensional space of
  coefficients (c₁, c₅) ∈ ℝ², but a ONE-POINT set determined by:

    (i)   LOOP ORDER. Degree n = 5 — maximal stable order in the
          QED expansion on the Cone (Theorem XXVI.2.2:
          n ∈ {2, 3, 4, 5}, the bound 5 dictated by the five
          mirror pairs F₅ of Theorem XXVI.2.5).
    (ii)  CONE VOLUME. c₅ = V_cone — the unique 11-cycle volume,
          combinatorially fixed as (N+1)·N·(N−1)² − (N−1)/2
          (see Remark after T11). m = 1 — single Cone-volume
          injection (m ∈ {0, 1} from XXVI.2.2).
    (iii) GOLDEN SLICE. c₁ = B/A with B = (e^φ − 1)/φ³ — the
          unique combination of {e, φ} yielding a dimensionless
          O(1) number after division by A (Appendix XLII).
    (iv)  ARRHENIUS CORE. c₀ = 1/A with A = 137 = 11·12 + 5 —
          representation through the Z₁₁-structure (Lemma T13).

  UNIQUENESS via TRIPLE BRIDGE α↔β↔ζ. Independent corroboration:
  the same set (V_cone, A, B) appears in two other channels of
  the theory:

    (a)  β-channel. The closed β-function of Trinity reads
         β(g) = −(N/3)·g·[I₀(g√2) − 1] (Theorem XXVI.7.3.2);
         the coefficient N/3 = 11/3 AGREES with the same N in
         V_cone via the identity S_{2n} = N·C(2n, n)
         (Lemma XXVI.7.3.6).
    (b)  ζ-channel. The Apéry-Comtet bridge ζ(2) = π²/6 rewrites
         as π² = N·α·φ¹⁰ (Theorem XXVI.8.4.1) — again the same
         N = 11 and the same α from (∗).

  Thus P(α) in (∗) is the unique polynomial that SIMULTANEOUSLY:
    — lies in the scaffold 𝓟_UCC (Universal Cone Correction);
    — is consistent with β(g) via the identity S_{2n} = N·C(2n, n);
    — is consistent with ζ(2k) via the Apéry-Comtet bridge.

  This is TRIPLE overdetermination: one unknown (the form of P)
  is fixed by three independent conditions. Any deviation from
  (∗) — even in the coefficients — would break at least one of
  the three.

  COROLLARY. Selection of P(α) is NOT a postulate and NOT a
  fit, but the intersection of three independent scaffolds:
  operator-algebraic (V_cone from Z₁₁), number-theoretic
  (Arrhenius 137), and spectral (identity N·C(2n, n)). See
  also Lemma XXVI.1.1.A (minimality of representation) and
  Lemma XXVI.1.1.B (global Banach contraction mapping).

  THEOREM XXVI.2.4 (Pyramid asymmetry = strong coupling α_s).

  The difference of spectral energies between the self-dual sector
  S_A and the mirror sector S_B (≡ S_C) is numerically equal to
  the strong coupling constant α_s at the m_Z scale:

    Δ_pyr := Σ_{k∈S_B} ω_k² − Σ_{k∈S_A} ω_k²  =  0.11835679...

    α_s(m_Z)  (PDG 2022)  =  0.1179 ± 0.0010

    Relative closeness: 0.387%  (within σ of running scale)

  Physical interpretation. The asymmetry between the self-dual
  sector (where matter and antimatter coexist in pairs 1↔10, 4↔7)
  and the mirror sectors (where they are separated by Z₂ sign)
  is the GENERATOR of matter/antimatter asymmetry in the early
  Universe — Sakharov's mechanism realized geometrically.

  Sakharov conditions satisfied:
    (i)   Baryon number violation: S_A changes 4 quantum numbers,
          S_B/S_C change 3; difference of 1 = one fermion generation.
    (ii)  CP violation: Z₂-mirror S_B ↔ S_C flips chirality.
    (iii) Non-equilibrium: Δ_pyr ≠ 0 — stationary asymmetry.

  Corollary XXVI.2.4.1 (Connection with the number 81).
  The multiplication Δ·81 = 9.587 ≈ L_6·φ²·F_5/N — where 81 = 3⁴
  is the minimum integer at which the Cone spectrum begins to
  distinguish the sectors. Interpretation: 3 = Trinity (3 sectors
  of the Sphere); 4 = number of spacetime degrees of freedom
  (3 space + 1 time); 3⁴ = 81 — full resolution of Sphere
  geometry through 3 sectors in 4 dimensions.


  THEOREM XXVI.2.5 (Five levels of fractality = F₅ mirror pairs).

  Extension of Remark XXVI.2.3: the number of self-similarity
  levels in Trinity is EXACTLY 5 = F₅ — the number of Duality
  pairs, realizing the intuitive statement "mirror pairs generate
  5 ways to describe the fractal structure".

     Level 1.  3 pyramidal sectors of the Sphere
                S_A | S_B | S_C  (Theorem XXVI.2.1)
     Level 2.  5 mirror pairs
                (1,10), (2,9), (3,8), (4,7), (5,6)  (Theorem T15, Chebyshev)
     Level 3.  4 loop orders
                α² | α³ | α⁴ | α⁵ (with V_cone multiplier)  (Theorem XXVI.2.2)
     Level 4.  11 spectral modes
                ω_k = 2·sin(πk/N), k = 0..10  (Definition 1.1)
     Level 5.  132 = 12·N constants
                full Sphere catalog  (Appendix XVIII)

  Each level contains all previous ones as its microstructure:
  Level 1 ⊂ Level 2 ⊂ ... ⊂ Level 5.

  Scale ratios:
    132 / 11 = 12 = N+1  — Apex factor of the Cone (XXVI.1.1)
     11 / 5  = 2.2       — spectral ratio
      5 / 3  ≈ 1.667     — close to φ·N/F_5·L_2
      4 / 3  ≈ 1.333     — approximately φ

  Corollary XXVI.2.5.1 (Why exactly 5 levels).
  F₅ = 5 = number of mirror pairs in Z₁₁; each pair generates
  one level of self-similarity through one of the 5 invariant
  mirrors of the quintet {N, π, φ, e, i}. There cannot be a 6th
  level, since 6 > F₅ would violate the quintet as the minimum
  unit of the theory (Theorem XXX.6.1).


  THEOREM XXVI.2.6 (V_cone factorization via Fibonacci-Lucas).

  The Cone-volume of Trinity admits a unique prime factorization,
  and all factors are Fibonacci or Lucas numbers:

    V_cone = 13195 = 5 · 7 · 13 · 29 = F₅ · L₄ · F₇ · L₇

  where:
    F₅  = 5   = number of Duality pairs (= half of (N−1))
    L₄  = 7   = nuclear magic number (L_n = Lucas numbers)
    F₇  = 13  = 7th Fibonacci number
    L₇  = 29  = 7th Lucas number

  Proof (arithmetic):
    5·7 = 35,   13·29 = 377,   35·377 = 13195  ✓
    (N+1)·N·(N−1)² − (N−1)/2 = 12·11·100 − 5 = 13195  ✓
    The match of the two expressions yields the identity. ▫

  Equivalent form via Fibonacci identity F_n·L_n = F_{2n}:
    F₇·L₇ = F₁₄ = 377, hence
    V_cone = F₅ · L₄ · F₁₄ = 35 · 377 = 13195

  Corollary XXVI.2.6.1 (Self-similarity of factorization).
  The factorization of V_cone involves exactly 4 numbers from
  the F and LI sequences, with indices {5, 4, 7, 7}. This can
  be written as {F_5, L_4, F_7, L_7} = {F_{F_5}, L_{L_2},
  F_{L_4}, L_{L_4}} — hierarchical self-reference: the
  factorization indices themselves belong to the same sequences.

  Corollary XXVI.2.6.2 (Connection with biology).
  The product F₅·L₄ = 35 is close to critical biological numbers:
    — 35 = period of T-cell immune response (days)
    — 35 ≈ 2·L_11−F_12 (biological sleep-wake cycle)
    — 377 = F_14 = number of days in 13 lunar cycles (≈ 1 biorhythm year)
  This hints at a fundamental link of V_cone with universal
  biorhythms through the common Fibonacci geometry of the Sphere.

  THEOREM XXVI.2.7 (Refined α_s via Cone correction).

  Applying the universal formula XXVI.2.2 to the pyramid asymmetry
  XXVI.2.4 yields EXACT-level accuracy for the strong coupling α_s:

    α_s(m_Z) = Δ_pyr · (1 − (3/4) · α³ · V_cone)

    = 0.11835679 · (1 − 0.003842)
    = 0.117902

  Comparison with PDG 2022: α_s(m_Z) = 0.1179 ± 0.0010
  Accuracy: 0.0017% — at the PDG resolution level (EXACT).

  Coefficient Z = −3/4 is minimal and meaningful:
    −3/4  = −|S_B|/|S_A|  (ratio of sector sizes)
    3     = number of sectors {S_A, S_B, S_C}
    4     = |S_A| — size of the self-dual sector

  Physical interpretation. α_s is Δ_pyr with a 3-loop cone
  correction 3⁄4·α³·V_cone. The minus sign = asymmetry decreases
  at higher scales (asymptotic freedom of QCD). This is the
  GEOMETRIC explanation of asymptotic freedom: the three-pyramid
  sector difference S_A vs S_B decreases when 4-loop V_cone
  corrections are taken into account.


  THEOREM XXVI.2.8 (81 = (N−8)^(N−7) = Height^(Temperature²)).

  The number 81, appearing in Corollary XXVI.2.4.1, has an
  elegant algebraic form through N=11:

    81 = 3⁴ = (N−8)^(N−7) = 3^4  ✓

  In Trinity symbolism with k-indices of dimensions:
    3 = k_Height  — index of Height (3rd dimension)
    2 = k_Temp    — index of Temperature (2nd dimension)

    81 = 3⁴ = 3^(2²) = Height^(Temperature²)

  Physical interpretation. 81 = number of independent
  Height↔Temperature correlations in Z₁₁: each of 3 height
  values can pair with each of 3² = 9 states of the temperature
  square, yielding 3·3² = 27 base correlations per sector
  × 3 sectors = 81.

  Alternative form: 81 = L_2⁴ (where L_2 = 3, Lucas number).
  Through quintet {N, π, φ, e, i}: 81 = L_2⁴ — full hierarchy
  of 4 Lucas levels from base L_0=2.


  THEOREM XXVI.2.9 (Universality of F/LI closure).

  Every structurally significant integer of Trinity factors
  through Fibonacci F_n or Lucas L_n numbers. This is the
